# comfyui_subgraph_catalog (Data Source)

Lists read-only editor-native subgraph catalog entries exposed by ComfyUI /global_subgraphs.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `entries` (Attributes List) Catalog entries keyed by ComfyUI's SHA-derived subgraph identifier. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))
- `entry_count` (Number) Number of subgraph catalog entries returned by /global_subgraphs.

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) SHA-derived subgraph catalog identifier.
- `info_json` (String) Raw JSON serialization of the entry info object for forward-compatible metadata preservation.
- `name` (String) Subgraph display name.
- `node_pack` (String) Node pack metadata reported inside info.node_pack.
- `source` (String) Catalog source reported by ComfyUI, such as templates or custom_node.
